generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR producing raw point‑cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudData
]
instance LiDARRawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]
instance LiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized, type‑aligned, unit‑converted LiDAR point‑cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation, ROS2CommunicationEnabler, ClusterTrackingEnabler
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor for motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateRawData
]
instance MotorStateRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]
instance MotorState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized, type‑aligned, unit‑converted motor state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation, ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance SteeringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor for steering"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringStateRawData
]
instance SteeringStateRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringSensor
]
instance SteeringState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized, type‑aligned, unit‑converted steering state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringStateRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation, ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance ServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor for servo"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ServoStateRawData
]
instance ServoStateRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ServoSensor
]
instance ServoState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized, type‑aligned, unit‑converted servo state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ServoStateRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslation, ROS2CommunicationEnabler
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes, type‑aligns, and unit‑converts data as per ISO 23247"
    DTDFVocab:enables UniversalDataTranslationService
]
instance UniversalDataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Converts raw sensor data into standardized formats per ISO 23247"
    DTDFVocab:provides LiDARDataPreparationInsight, MotorStatePreparationInsight, SteeringStatePreparationInsight, ServoStatePreparationInsight
]

instance LiDARDataPreparationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prepared LiDAR point‑cloud data ready for ROS 2 publication"
]
instance MotorStatePreparationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prepared motor state data ready for ROS 2 publication"
]
instance SteeringStatePreparationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prepared steering state data ready for ROS 2 publication"
]
instance ServoStatePreparationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prepared servo state data ready for ROS 2 publication"
]

instance ROS2CommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides low‑latency ROS 2 communication over UDP"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2PublishingService
]
instance ROS2PublishingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Publishes sensor data to ROS 2 topics"
    DTDFVocab:provides ROS2DataPublishedInsight
]
instance ROS2DataPublishedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Sensor data published on ROS 2 topics"
]

instance ClusterTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables point‑cloud clustering and tracking on ROS 2"
    DTDFVocab:enables ClusterTrackingService
]
instance ClusterTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Clusters LiDAR point‑clouds and tracks detected objects, producing object tracks and a projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight, ProjectedPathInsight
]
instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from clustering and tracking"
]
instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on tracking data"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables off‑loading ACC algorithm to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs ACC algorithm in cloud and calculates desired speed command"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedCommandDeliveryAction
]
instance SpeedCommandDeliveryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends computed speed command to vehicle safety‑critical actuator via low‑latency channel"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides remote control of ACC, desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and issue emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]
instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables or disables ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollectionReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Collects data for analysis, troubleshooting, and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionReportingService
]
instance DataCollectionReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates sensor and state data for developers to generate performance reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataReportInsight
]
instance DataReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance and troubleshooting data report"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring through UI displaying vehicle state, projected path, and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDisplayInsight
]
instance RealTimeDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time display of vehicle state and tracking data"
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin of teleoperated 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
]
instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin embodying virtual representation and services"
]
instance User : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operator interacting with the Digital Twin via UI"
]
instance TestEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwin, User
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms is required across devices to enable computation offloading in the vehicle. No tighter synchronization is feasible due to hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin orchestration follows the ISO 23247 Reference Architecture, mapping each functional element (FE) to a ROS2 package that runs as a node on the vehicle. The architecture separates concerns across three entities: Physical Twin Entity (managing sensors, actuators, and general automotive functions such as point‑cloud clustering & tracking), Digital Twin Entity (housing data management, control mechanisms, and higher‑level modeling), and User Entity (providing a 3D visualization and control‑panel interface). System resources (compute, sensors, actuators) are distributed across these entities, and common ROS2 topics/services enable integration, while the shared high‑precision clock ensures temporal alignment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical communication fabric consists of two layers: an inter‑entity layer that transports high‑rate sensor and actuator data over Wi‑Fi using the UDP protocol, and an intra‑entity layer where ROS 2 nodes publish and subscribe to serialized, unit‑aligned messages on a local ROS 2 network. The architecture does not specify stricter network topologies, bandwidth/latency requirements, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to the ISO 23247 “Digital twin framework for manufacturing” which defines a reference architecture and information exchange model.  It implements the Data Collection and Device Control, Digital Twin, and User entities as specified, and uses OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) as a data‑exchange protocol to achieve interoperability with legacy manufacturing equipment and enterprise systems."
]
